title: Speedbridging wool
description: Adds a line so you know where to aim your cursor when Speed bridging.
body:
This pack assists you in speedbridging by giving you a line on the side of the block to place your line this can help beginners learn and experts get ready to rush the other team. This pack is designed for bedwars.

If there is a version that does not exist please email me here so i know to add it:
zwhseton@gmail.com
